qualifications.name: B Architecture
notes: Qualification code: B8BA3Q.
Campus: APB.
Career paths: Architectural professionals, Design of built environments, Technological resolution and management of building design and construction.

NCV admission summary: NCV admission summary: Degree: NCV level 4 issued by the Council for General and Further Education and Training, At least 70% for 5 of the 7 subjects, At least 70% in English as Language of Teaching and Learning or First Additional Language, plus one additional language, At least 70% in Mathematics as a fundamental subject; Diploma: NCV level 4 issued by the Council for General and Further Education and Training, At least 60% for 5 of the 7 subjects, At least 60% in English as Language of Teaching and Learning or First Additional Language, plus one additional language, At least 60% in Mathematics or 70% in Mathematical Literacy as a fundamental subject.
Additional UJ requirements: Mathematical Literacy not accepted; Technical Mathematics not accepted.
